---
title: "Causal Inference"
subtitle: "See It, Break It, Prove It"
sidebar: true
toc: false
page-layout: full
---

::: {.hero}

[Causal Inference]{.hero-title}

[Master causal inference through interactive simulation --- from potential outcomes to modern difference-in-differences]{.hero-subtitle}

[Begin the journey](00-intro/index.qmd){.hero-cta}

:::

## Learning Path {.unlisted}

::: {.module-map}

<a href="00-intro/index.html" class="module-card">
<span class="module-card__number">Module 0</span>
<span class="module-card__title">Introduction</span>
<span class="module-card__desc">Why causal inference matters and how this book is structured.</span>
</a>

<a href="01-fundamental-problem/index.html" class="module-card">
<span class="module-card__number">Module 1</span>
<span class="module-card__title">The Fundamental Problem</span>
<span class="module-card__desc">Potential outcomes, selection bias, and the power of randomization.</span>
</a>

<a href="02-dags/index.html" class="module-card">
<span class="module-card__number">Module 2</span>
<span class="module-card__title">Directed Acyclic Graphs</span>
<span class="module-card__desc">Encode assumptions visually. Learn d-separation and control strategy.</span>
</a>

<a href="03-statistical-foundations/index.html" class="module-card">
<span class="module-card__number">Module 3</span>
<span class="module-card__title">Statistical Foundations</span>
<span class="module-card__desc">Distributions, hypothesis testing, and confidence intervals.</span>
</a>

<a href="04-regression/index.html" class="module-card">
<span class="module-card__number">Module 4</span>
<span class="module-card__title">Regression</span>
<span class="module-card__desc">OLS mechanics, Frisch-Waugh-Lovell, omitted variable bias, and inference.</span>
</a>

<a href="05-panel/index.html" class="module-card">
<span class="module-card__number">Module 5</span>
<span class="module-card__title">Panel Data</span>
<span class="module-card__desc">Panel structure, fixed effects, and practical estimation issues.</span>
</a>

<a href="06-did/index.html" class="module-card">
<span class="module-card__number">Module 6</span>
<span class="module-card__title">Difference-in-Differences</span>
<span class="module-card__desc">Classic DiD, parallel trends, staggered adoption, and modern estimators.</span>
</a>

<a href="07-iv/index.html" class="module-card">
<span class="module-card__number">Module 7</span>
<span class="module-card__title">Instrumental Variables</span>
<span class="module-card__desc">Endogeneity, 2SLS, weak instruments, and the local average treatment effect.</span>
</a>

<a href="08-rdd/index.html" class="module-card">
<span class="module-card__number">Module 8</span>
<span class="module-card__title">Regression Discontinuity</span>
<span class="module-card__desc">Sharp and fuzzy designs, bandwidth choice, and validity tests.</span>
</a>

<a href="09-matching/index.html" class="module-card">
<span class="module-card__number">Module 9</span>
<span class="module-card__title">Matching &amp; Propensity Scores</span>
<span class="module-card__desc">Selection on observables, matching, weighting, and overlap diagnostics.</span>
</a>

<a href="10-synthetic-control/index.html" class="module-card">
<span class="module-card__number">Module 10</span>
<span class="module-card__title">Synthetic Control</span>
<span class="module-card__desc">Building a data-driven counterfactual from a weighted donor pool.</span>
</a>

:::
